title: Daisy Chain Making Robot
description: My final year project involving the design and implementation of a robot capable of creating daisy chains. This project received the highest possible grade and was highlighted by the University Of Glasgow at events and in media.

title: NFC Record Player
description: An record stand that scans NFC tags and communicates with the spotify API in order to play the coresponding albums on your devices.

title: Buckets and Buckets of Light
description: In colaboration with Jack Wimperis, we designed and built a 6 x 4 x 100 pixel LED Matrix with a fully 3d and reactive programme developed by me in TouchDesigner. This sculpture was displayed at the award winning 'Leeds Light Night' in 2025. For this project I also made a fully punctional scale replica of the sculpture for programme development and marketing.

title: Starlight Clock
description: A magical Clock that reveals the time in a star constelation when activated by a motion sensor.

title: Mechanical Sinosoid Generator
description: Purely mechanical device that can draw a perfect sinosoid as well as calcualte its values using a series of linkages.

title: Custom 'Tamagotchi'
description: A pocket sized interactive pet, programmed entirely in C++ using the ESP32-C3 micro.

title: Puzzle Game solver
description: A custom Depth First Search algorithm implemented in C++ used to solve a popular mobile puzzle game, 'Block Fill'.

title: Modular Caster system for a Helicopter
description: A custom Depth First Search algorithm implemented in C++ used to solve a popular mobile puzzle game, 'Block Fill'.

title: Mechanical Multi-tool Wallet
description: A Sleek, 5mm thick wallet incorpirating a pocket knife, two bit drivers, and a fire starter.

title: Self watering Plant Pot
description: A Planter able to store and provide two weeks worth of water using zero electronics.

title: Heart rate monitor
description: An IR based device that uses inteligent heuristic algorithms and a completely custom PCB to record and display heart rate in real time.

title: Camper Van
description: A custom-built camper van designed for off-grid adventures. Featuring a full solar power system, water storage, and a transformable living space.

title: Robotic Butler
description: My Final A-Level DT project, a fully functional small scale robot designed to deliver dishes in a resteraunt environment.

title: Evolutional Gearbox Generator
description: Originaly programmed for the mechanical sinosoid generator, this programme uses an evelutional algorithm to generate gearboxes with very specific ratios. This unique aproach allows the user to weigh objectives such as gear sizes, co-primes, number of stages, and target overall ratio to identify all possible gearboxes and their rankings.
